commit.subject: LU-8999 test: debug patch
commit.message:
LU-8999 test: debug patch

Debug patch to collect logs

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs austeroptions=-R\
envdefinitions=ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,DEBUG_SIZE=64,PTLDEBUG=rpctrace \
clientcount=2 osscount=2 mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 \
austeroptions=-R mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
testlist=sanity-quota,sanity-quota,sanity-quota,sanity-quota

Change-Id: I6cfb38491e780b4cd11f575f9ca4fd8632c61e51
Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao.zhang@intel.com>
